title: Unbreakable Diamond and Netherite
description: Makes Diamond and Netherite tools and armor unbreakable.
body:
- **Diamond and Netherite tools are unbreakable!** No need for mending or unbreaking.
- **Diamond and Netherite armor and Elytra are automatically given Mending and Unbreaking III** when equipped!

And that's it!
